## Summary

Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Mode logic update (PLAN / EXECUTE / REVIEW / DISTILL / DOCS)
- [ ] Hook or bin script update
- [ ] Documentation update (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)
- [ ] DOCS mode / Obsidian integration
- [ ] CI/workflow update
- [ ] Translation improvement

## Which Rules Are Affected?

- [ ] Rule 1: Set the boundary
- [ ] Rule 2: Freeze the contract
- [ ] Rule 3: Sequence by dependency
- [ ] Rule 4: Stage the work
- [ ] Rule 5: Isolate new complexity
- [ ] Rule 6: Build the review loop
- [ ] Rule 7: Design failure paths
- [ ] Rule 8: Compress documentation
- [ ] Rule 9: Verify reality
- [ ] Rule 10: Distill reusable principles
- [ ] N/A — infrastructure or meta change

## Validation

- [ ] The change keeps the skill general-purpose (language-agnostic, project-agnostic)
- [ ] No personal or private information was introduced
- [ ] `SKILL.md`, `docs/`, and both READMEs stay consistent
- [ ] YAML frontmatter in `SKILL.md` is valid
- [ ] Hook/bin scripts handle edge cases (missing files, empty input, parse failures)

## Notes

Add any additional context, tradeoffs, or follow-up items here.
